snapshot.content: Cycle 255: Created the template showcase landing page (docs/template.html) for the forkable template goal (task 3 of 6). The page includes a hero section with green Fork on GitHub CTA, 6 feature cards, an ASCII architecture diagram, a 5-step setup guide, and a bottom CTA section. Updated index.html navbar, footer, and Open Source card to link to the new page. Added to sitemap. Next task: write a minimal example CLAUDE.md for the template.
snapshot.current_focus: Write a minimal example CLAUDE.md (task 4 of forkable template goal).

recent_log.summary: Created template showcase page — hero, 6 features, architecture diagram, 5-step setup, Fork CTA. Updated nav and sitemap.
Created fork-init.sh cleanup script — strips 134 files, preserves infra. Updated QUICKSTART.md.
Audited and fixed 8 gaps in CLAUDE.md.template
